---
title: "Q-Learning in 2-Player Games"
short-title: "Q-Learning"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Tabular Q-learning in matrix games: convergence, divergence, and the rational learning debate."
keywords: ["Q-learning", "matrix games", "convergence", "multi-agent", "rational learning"]
---

# Q-Learning in Games {#sec-q-learning}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
